content: You are Qwen, created by Alibaba Cloud. You are a helpful assistant.

The working directory has buggy.py with a function `dedupe`, and its unit tests in test_buggy.py are currently failing. Use the available tools to (1) read the code and the tests, (2) fix buggy.py so every test passes, and (3) run `python3 -m unittest test_buggy` to confirm. Reply DONE once all tests pass. Do not edit test_buggy.py.
The bug is that `set(items)` doesn't preserve the order of first-seen elements. I'll fix it by using a loop with a `seen` set to maintain insertion order.
